descriptions.ja: 双方向対応高圧スマート電力量メータ
descriptions.en: Bidirectional high voltage smart electric energy meter

note.ja: 日本国内では以下の値域である。1バイト目：0x00 2～4バイト目：メーカコード0x000000~0xFFFFFF 5～16バイト目：自由領域
note.en: The following value ranges are available in Japan. 1st byte: 0x00 2nd–4th bytes: Manufacturer code 0x000000–0xFFFFFF 5th–16th bytes: free area

descriptions.ja: 月間最大需要電力(正方向、逆方向計測値)
descriptions.en: Monthly maximum electric power demand (normal and reverse directions)

note.ja: EPC=0xC5, 0xD3, 0xD4 の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xC5, 0xD3 and 0xD4.

descriptions.ja: 累積最大需要電力(正方向、逆方向計測値)
descriptions.en: Cumulative maximum electric power demand (normal and reverse directions)

note.ja: EPC=0xC7, 0xD3, 0xD4 の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xC7, 0xD3 and 0xD4.

descriptions.ja: 定時需要電力(30分平均電力)(正方向、逆方向計測値)
descriptions.en: Electric power demand at fixed time (30-minute average electric power) (normal and reverse directions)

note.ja: EPC=0xC5, 0xD3, 0xD4 の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xC5, 0xD3 and 0xD4.

descriptions.ja: 需要電力計測値履歴(正方向計測値)
descriptions.en: Historical data of measured electric power demand (normal direction)
Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved
Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved

note.ja: Queryは履歴収集日 (省略時は0)。EPC=0xC5, 0xD3, 0xD4 の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: Query is Day for collection (default value is 0). The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xC5, 0xD3 and 0xD4.

descriptions.ja: 需要電力計測値履歴(逆方向計測値)
descriptions.en: Historical data of measured electric power demand (reverse direction)
Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved
Day for which the historical data of measured cumulative amounts of electric energy is to be retrieved

note.ja: Queryは履歴収集日 (省略時は0)。EPC=0xC5, 0xD3, 0xD4 の値を乗算済みの値
note.en: Query is Day for collection (default value is 0). The value is multipled by the value of EPC=0xC5, 0xD3 and 0xD4.
